#ad Reset looks a little different these days.
Making sure the house is taken care of, so she can rest—and for me, that starts with my routine too. The new LISTERINE® Citrus Mint has been a simple part of that reset. Taking care of what matters. Grab it exclusively at @Target @listerine #ListerinePartner #WashYourMouth

caption.text:
Went out to cut the grass… ended up fixing a leak 

Honestly a super easy fix once I found it.

One of those things you’re glad you catch early.  #DIYDad #LawnCare #HomeMaintenance #Irrigation DadLife

#ad Starting my day right makes all the difference..
First thing every morning, I make sure I’m taking care of my whole routine—including my mouth. The new LISTERINE® Citrus Mint has been an easy add that helps me feel clean and ready to go. Simple habit. Big difference. You can grab it exclusively at @target @listerine #ListerinePartner #WashYourMouth

caption.text:
This was getting out of control…

Playroom + gym + life = chaos 😅

Finally took the time to reset it and it feels WAY better now 💪

Used these storage baskets to clean everything up and make it actually functional.

👉 Linked everything in my bio if you want to check them out

Sometimes you don’t need more space…
you just need a reset.

caption.text: Happy 39th Birthday🎉 to you baby.  This has been a fun and exciting year filled with so many memories.  Wishing you all the love, happiness and most of all a happy, healthy pregnancy and delivery so we can greet your favorite present, another happy health baby.  We love you boo 🥰

caption.text:
First father-son workout on our amp 💪

Isaiah and I have both been focusing on staying consistent with workouts this year, and we’ve been talking about training together for a while.

So we finally got our first one in — solid lower body session.

Already looking forward to the next one.  #FatherSonWorkout
#FamilyFitness
#StayConsistent
#WorkoutTogether
#RunTheCooper

caption.text:
It never fails 😆

We’re out with Ila and someone says,
“Awwww, baby #2 on the way?”

Us: “Actually… she’s the youngest of FOUR.”

Them: 👁👄👁

And somehow we always get,
“But y’all don’t even look old enough to have older kids!”

We don’t argue.
We just go home to our high schooler, 2 middle schooler, and our toddler. 😂💛

caption.text:
Dad picked the fits 😌

 I always love matching outfits. I decided to get Ila and Duana matching with me this morning.

Should I keep styling the family?

caption.text:
Week 1 of my calisthenics challenge 💪

Hollow Hold — 1:23
Scap Pull-Ups — 7
Strict Pull-Ups — 14
Dips — 18
Push-Ups — 32

Working on building real strength and mastering the fundamentals so I can level up to advanced calisthenics.

This is just the starting point.

Consistency is the key. Week 2 coming.

#CalisthenicsProgression #PullUpTraining #BodyweightStrength #TrainToProgress #RunTheCoopers

caption.text:
Snow days don’t last long, but the memories somehow do.
Two years in a row feels extra special — watching our girl experience this kind of magic never gets old. ❄️🤍#SnowDayMagic

#ParenthoodUnfiltered

caption.text:
Everyone thinks my brother and I are twins 👀
Same workout. Built for different people.

We ran a partner workout on amp and it adjusted to each of us automatically — no changing weights, no guesswork, no slowing each other down.

Same workout. Built for different people.
Train smarter with amp.

caption.text:
January, Week 3 💪
Another week locked in with my bodybuilding program — training with intention, staying consistent, and trusting the process.

Progress doesn’t come from one workout. It comes from showing up every week.

#RunTheCoopers #BodybuildingJourney #StayConsistent #TrainSmart #FitnessProgress

caption.text:
2016 was definitely a fun time. I was at some of my peak of working out my boo @thecurlycoopers graduated with her BS and just started at Georgia Tech.  And this was also the year that we started our YouTube channel so if anyone wants a throwback go check out our first YouTube video.  #2016Trend
#Throwback #2016Vibes #FitnessThrowback #OldPhotos

carousel_media.accessibility_caption: Photo by Curtis Cooper on January 15, 2026.
Photo shared by Curtis Cooper on January 15, 2026 tagging @thecurlycoopers.
Photo by Curtis Cooper on January 15, 2026.
Photo by Curtis Cooper on January 15, 2026.

caption.text:
August → October .

This was my first time working with a personal trainer.
Looking back, I spent years trying to force progress without a plan.  Thanks to @building.bodies my personal trainer, I got the right plan.

The right nutrition, workouts, and consistency changed everything.
I’m not finished yet — but I finally have the recipe.  #fitnessjourney 
#bodytransformation 
#ConsistencyOverEverything
#ProgressNotPerfection
#LifestyleFitness

caption.text:
#ad First workout with amp and yeah… I was impressed.

The resistance is legit, the setup is simple, and everything feels really intuitive. It’s already calibrated to you, but I still had the option to bump it up on a few exercises just to push harder.

With 500+ targeted exercises, a personalized plan that adapts as you progress, and AI that guides and adjusts with you in real time, this really is an all-in-one workout at home.

Week one starts now. 💪🔥 Please click the link in bio for more information.

#amp #RunTheCoopers #HomeWorkout #SmartFitness StrengthTraining FitnessJourney @amp.fitness

caption.text: Time to put lights on the van.  Years ago I did this and the kids loved it, so I knew that Ila would love it.  This time I used @command strips and LED string lights that use AA batteries.  after I did, I found out they actually have outdoor command strips that are clear. I’ll use those next time.

caption.text:
Christmas around the corner me and Ila decided to make some gingerbread cookies for the first time.  They came out so delicious.  Here is the recipe that we followed:

Ingredients
* ½ cup unsalted butter, at room temperature
* ⅔ cup packed dark brown sugar
* ⅓ cup unsulphured blackstrap molasses, we like the Wholesome brand
* 1 large egg yolk
* 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
* 2¼ cups all-purpose flour, spooned and leveled
* 2 teaspoons cinnamon
* 2 teaspoons ground ginger
* 1 teaspoon baking soda
* ½ teaspoon fine sea salt
* ¼ teaspoon ground cloves
* 1 tablespoon milk

Instructions
* In the bowl of a stand mixer, or using an electric mixer, cream the butter and brown sugar. Add the molasses, egg yolk, and vanilla and mix again.

* In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, cinnamon, ginger, baking soda, salt, and cloves. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, mixing after each addition. Mix in the milk. 
* Form the dough into a ball, divide the ball in half, and flatten each half into a 1-inch-thick disk. Wrap in plastic and chill for at least 2 hours.

* Preheat the oven to 350°F and line two large baking sheets with parchment paper.

* Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface until about ¼-inch thick. Use cookie cutters to cut out desired shapes, then transfer the cut-outs to the prepared baking sheets, re-rolling the dough scraps as necessary. 
* Bake, one sheet at a time, for 7 to 9 minutes, or until the edges of the cookies are just set but the middles are still soft. The cookies might seem underdone, but taking them out at this point will ensure that they stay soft once they cool. I typically use a 3-inch cookie cutter and bake my cookies for 8 minutes. The exact timing will depend on your oven, the size of your cookie cutters, and how soft or crunchy you like your gingerbread cookies.

* Let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely. Decorate as desired.  #christmascookies #cookierecipe

music_asset_info.title: It's Beginning to Look a Lot like Christmas

caption.text:
We’re PREGNANT🤰🏽Baby number #5 was always part of the plan so Ila would have a little sibling to grow up with, like her big siblings did. We are so excited😆. 

Y’all probably knew something was up because I’ve been MIA for a while. The sickness always takes your girl out. This sickness reminded me a lot of when I was sick with our oldest Ia🫠 

We can't wait to have our new bundle of joy this summer🤱🏾

Did y’all know?

caption.text:
Happy 40th birthday baby😘 I can’t believe I’m saying that😆
Also, happy 18th marriage anniversary. These have been the best years of my life❤️ The Lord lead me right to you over and over again.

caption.text: Happy 18 year anniversary, baby.  You are the only birthday present that I need.  For anyone that doesn’t know me and Duana got married in the courthouse on my birthday in 2007 and then in March the following year we did a small wedding at our church.  We paid for the whole thing out-of-pocket. I think it was like two or $3000 but it’s not the money that matters. It’s the love.  I love looking back and seeing all the wonderful memories that we have and I’m looking forward to making many more.

caption.text: On a rainy day, there’s no better way to spend some time with my little baby girl than baking.  We had some overly ripe bananas lying around so we made some delicious banana bread.  It is definitely Ila approved😋. Let me know in the comments if you want the recipe. #bakewithme #bananabreadrecipe

caption.text: Happy birthday to my boy Isaac, today he turns 14.  He is turning into an amazing young man.  Even though it’s his birthday, he still had to go to school early in the morning🤣🤣

node.accessibility_caption: Photo shared by Curtis Cooper on October 17, 2025 tagging @thecurlycoopers, and @ias.diaryyy.

caption.text:
Best reaction ever🥹

I can’t believe we surprised Ia with her first car. 

If you know Ia, then you know it’s hard to try to surprise her because she thinks she knows everything. GOT HER😂 

We are so proud of you and you are so deserving😘

Yall think she was surprised?

caption.text:
Month 3, Week 3 ✅ 
Another week down—this workout we hit a abs, back and shoulders. 💪🔥

I’ve noticed the longer you stay consistent the easier it is to be consistent.  The hardest part is getting started.🏋🏾‍♂️

#RunTheCoopers #FitnessJourney #HIITWorkout #Consistency #MuscleBuilding #LeanAndStrong

caption.text:
Month 3, Week 3 ✅ 
Consistency is the key—this week we hit a 15 x 15 HIIT workout focused on chest, arms, and glutes. 💪🔥

We’re staying committed with our trainer to lean down and build muscle mass. Who else is chasing progress this week? 🏋🏾‍♂️

#RunTheCoopers #FitnessJourney #HIITWorkout #Consistency #MuscleBuilding #LeanAndStrong
